schema.description:
Allow to get detailed subresources about subscription.

| Key | Description |
|---|---|
| all | Add all subressources.|
| AddressBilling | Add billing address related to customer who paid the subscription.|
| Customer | Add details about the customer who subscribe.|
| CustomerBuyer | Add details about the customer who buy.|
| CustomerBalance | add current customer balance content.|
| Offer | Add details about the offer related to the subscription.|
| Renewal | .|
| Segment | Add details about the related segment.|
| SettingsPayment | Add details about the payment settings related to the customer.|
| UserCreation | Add details about the user who created the ressource.|
| UserUpdate | Add details about the user who last updated the ressource.|
schema.title: SubscriptionExtra
